channel.title: digital-commons on errbufferoverlf.me
channel.description: Recent content in digital-commons on errbufferoverlf.me

item.title: Building your own offline file-sharing and communication system for the inevitable downfall of the Internet
item.description: Have you ever considered a world where the Internet in all it’s grandeur and tyre-fire-ness has finally imploded. Well after living for 8 months without the Internet I did and it looked a little like this.
